title: cynanchum acutum var. longifolium
intro: Cynanchum acutum var. longifolium, also known as the Chinese milkvetch or Long-leaved Cynanchum, is a plant species within the Apocynaceae family. It is primarily valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and hepatoprotective effects. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing blood pressure, alleviating fever, and improving liver function. Cynanchum acutum var. longifolium can be prepared into herbal remedies like teas, infusions, and decoctions, and is often used in traditional Chinese medicine to support overall well-being.
